description_long: This helmet features a rugged, military-inspired design with a matte brown finish and prominent red-tipped spikes arranged in a mohawk pattern along the top and sides. The front displays a set of bullets attached above the brow and a large anarchy symbol painted in black. On one side, a peace symbol and a patch are visible, while the other side is marked with the phrase 'BORN TO KILL' in bold, graffiti-style red and black letters. The helmet is equipped with a black chin strap for secure fastening. The overall appearance is aggressive and rebellious, blending punk and combat aesthetics. The surface is adorned with various graphic elements, giving it a distinctive, personalized look.
description: A brown, spiked helmet with red-tipped mohawk spikes, graffiti-style text, and punk-military motifs, including bullets and symbols.
description_view_0: Top view showing the central red spike, peace symbol, and side patch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mohawk of red-tipped spikes, bullets, and anarchy symbol.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the central spike and the helmet's symmetrical shape.
description_view_3: Side view displaying 'BORN TO KILL' text, peace symbol, and the continuation of the mohawk spikes.
attribute_graphic_design: Graffiti-style text ('BORN TO KILL'), anarchy and peace symbols, bullets, and red-tipped mohawk spikes; punk and military motifs.
